title: A Letter to a Pen Pal

paragraphs.en: I hope you are well! My name is Lucas and I am twelve years old. I live in London with my parents and my little sister, Clara. I am writing to you because our teacher said we could have pen pals from abroad. I was very excited when I heard about it!
paragraphs.fr: J'espere que tu vas bien ! Je m'appelle Lucas et j'ai douze ans. J'habite a Londres avec mes parents et ma petite soeur, Clara. Je t'ecris parce que notre professeur a dit que nous pouvions avoir des correspondants de l'etranger. J'etais tres enthousiaste quand j'en ai entendu parler !

paragraphs.en: Let me tell you about myself. I go to school every day and my favourite subjects are English and Science. I like playing football with my friends, and I also enjoy reading books. Last weekend, I read a book about space — it was amazing!
paragraphs.fr: Laisse-moi te parler de moi. Je vais a l'ecole tous les jours et mes matieres preferees sont l'anglais et les sciences. J'aime jouer au football avec mes amis, et j'aime aussi lire des livres. Le week-end dernier, j'ai lu un livre sur l'espace — c'etait genial !

paragraphs.en: Last summer, my family went on holiday to Scotland. We visited Edinburgh and stayed in a small hotel near the castle. It was beautiful but the weather was cold! We walked a lot and ate fish and chips every day. We had a great time together.
paragraphs.fr: L'ete dernier, ma famille est partie en vacances en Ecosse. Nous avons visite Edimbourg et loge dans un petit hotel pres du chateau. C'etait magnifique mais il faisait froid ! Nous avons beaucoup marche et mange du fish and chips tous les jours. Nous avons passe un super moment ensemble.

paragraphs.en: This year, we are going to travel to France! I am going to visit Paris because I want to see the Eiffel Tower. My sister is going to try French food, and my dad is going to take lots of photos. I can't wait!
paragraphs.fr: Cette annee, nous allons voyager en France ! Je vais visiter Paris parce que je veux voir la Tour Eiffel. Ma soeur va gouter la nourriture francaise, et mon papa va prendre plein de photos. J'ai trop hate !

paragraphs.en: I think France is a very beautiful country. In my opinion, French food is the best in the world! I hope we can meet when I come to France. I miss having a friend abroad, so I am very happy to write to you.
paragraphs.fr: Je pense que la France est un tres beau pays. A mon avis, la nourriture francaise est la meilleure du monde ! J'espere qu'on pourra se rencontrer quand je viendrai en France. Avoir un ami a l'etranger me manquait, alors je suis tres content de t'ecrire.

paragraphs.en: Please write back soon and tell me about your life, your family and your hobbies. I hope to hear from you!
paragraphs.fr: S'il te plait, ecris-moi bientot et parle-moi de ta vie, de ta famille et de tes loisirs. J'espere avoir de tes nouvelles !

vocabulary.definition_en: un message ecrit que l'on envoie a quelqu'un
vocabulary.example: I wrote a letter to my pen pal.

vocabulary.definition_en: un mot utilise au debut d'une lettre avant le nom de la personne
mettre des mots sur du papier ou un ecran
vocabulary.example: I like to write letters to my friends.

vocabulary.definition_en: vouloir que quelque chose arrive et penser que c'est possible
dans peu de temps, pas loin de maintenant
les uns avec les autres, en groupe
vocabulary.example: We had a great time together.

vocabulary.definition_en: se sentir triste parce que quelqu'un ou quelque chose n'est pas avec soi
vocabulary.example: I miss my friends when I am on holiday.

vocabulary.definition_en: dans ou vers un pays etranger
vocabulary.example: My pen pal lives abroad, in France.

vocabulary.definition_en: une personne a qui l'on ecrit des lettres en tant qu'ami, surtout dans un autre pays
vocabulary.example: I have a pen pal in Japan — we write to each other every month.

grammar_points.title: Review: present, past and future in one text
grammar_points.explanation: Dans une lettre, on melange souvent **trois temps** : le **present** (pour decrire notre vie actuelle), le **passe** (pour raconter des choses qui se sont passees) et le **futur avec 'going to'** (pour parler de projets). Reconnaitre quel temps est utilise et pourquoi est essentiel.
examples: Present: I live in London. I like playing football. = J'habite a Londres. J'aime jouer au football.
Past: Last summer, we went to Scotland. We visited Edinburgh. = L'ete dernier, nous sommes alles en Ecosse.
Future: This year, we are going to travel to France. = Cette annee, nous allons voyager en France.
Tip: Time markers help you choose: 'every day' (present), 'last summer' (past), 'this year / next week' (future).

grammar_points.title: Linking words: and, but, because, so
grammar_points.explanation: Les **linking words** (mots de liaison) relient les idees dans une phrase. **And** ajoute une information, **but** exprime un contraste, **because** donne une raison, **so** donne un resultat.
examples: I like football and I also enjoy reading. = J'aime le football et j'aime aussi la lecture.
It was beautiful but the weather was cold. = C'etait magnifique mais il faisait froid.
I am writing because our teacher said we could have pen pals. = J'ecris parce que notre prof a dit...
I miss having a friend abroad, so I am happy to write. = Avoir un ami a l'etranger me manquait, alors je suis content d'ecrire.

expressions.example: Dear Sophie, I hope you are well!
expressions.note: La facon standard de commencer une lettre ou un email. On utilise 'Dear' + le prenom de la personne pour quelqu'un que l'on connait.

expressions.meaning_fr: J'espere que tu vas bien / que vous allez bien
expressions.example: Dear Tom, I hope you are well!
expressions.note: Une phrase d'ouverture tres courante dans les lettres et emails en anglais.

expressions.example: I hope to hear from you — write back soon!
expressions.note: S'utilise a la fin d'une lettre amicale pour demander a la personne de repondre.

expressions.expression: I hope to hear from you
expressions.example: Write back soon — I hope to hear from you!
expressions.note: Une facon polie de terminer une lettre, exprimant que l'on souhaite que la personne reponde.

written.question: Which tense does Lucas use to describe his holiday in Scotland?
written.explanation: Lucas uses the past simple: 'went', 'visited', 'stayed', 'walked', 'ate' — because the holiday already happened.

written.question: Which linking word shows contrast?
written.explanation: 'But' shows contrast: 'It was beautiful but the weather was cold.' The two ideas are opposite.

written.question: How does Lucas talk about his future trip to France?
options: We travel to France every year.
We are going to travel to France.
written.explanation: Lucas uses 'going to' for future plans: 'We are going to travel to France.'

written.sentence: I like football ________ I also enjoy reading books.
written.hint: Use the linking word that adds information.

written.sentence: It was beautiful ________ the weather was cold.
written.hint: Use the linking word that shows contrast.

written.sentence: I am writing to you ________ our teacher said we could have pen pals.
written.hint: Use the linking word that gives a reason.

written.french: L'ete dernier, nous avons visite Edimbourg. C'etait magnifique !
written.suggested_answer: Last summer, we visited Edinburgh. It was beautiful!

written.french: Cette annee, je vais voyager en France parce que je veux voir la Tour Eiffel.
written.suggested_answer: This year, I am going to travel to France because I want to see the Eiffel Tower.

oral.instruction: Read this part of the letter aloud. Pay attention to the mix of tenses.
oral.text: Dear Sophie, I hope you are well! I live in London with my family. Last summer, we went to Scotland and visited Edinburgh. This year, we are going to travel to France. I can't wait! Write back soon!
oral.focus: Notice the three tenses: present (I live, I hope), past (we went, we visited), future (we are going to travel). Read naturally and clearly.

oral.question: Imagine you are writing to a pen pal. Tell them about your life now, something you did in the past, and your plans for the future.
oral.suggested_answer: Hello! My name is [name] and I live in [city]. I go to school and I like music and sports. Last summer, I went to the beach with my family. It was amazing! This year, I am going to visit my grandparents in the countryside. I can't wait!

oral.question: Why is it nice to have a pen pal? Use 'because', 'and' and 'but' in your answer.
oral.suggested_answer: I think having a pen pal is nice because you can learn about a different country. You can write about your life and your hobbies, but it is also interesting to read about their life. I like it because you make new friends!
vocabulary_hints: I think it is nice because...
